title: malaxis liliifolia
intro: Malaxis liliifolia, also known as the yellow adder's mouth, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Malaxis liliifolia have been studied, and it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat wounds and skin conditions. Malaxis liliifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some regions, it is also used to make a poultice for topical application.
